title: When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas
description: Elegant - and likely hostile - vessels lost in the seven seas...
body:
![Seven Seas](https://i.postimg.cc/ydXSmCxs/seven-seas-banner.png)

 

**Explore, loot and ravage wandering vessels lost in the seven seas.**

 

**Seven Seas** is an expansion of the structures mod [When Dungeons Arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise). While the latter focuses on massive land structures, Seven Seas takes this further by adding complex ships and other oceanic dungeons, while following similar design ideas, vanilla customization and datapack possibilities.

![](https://i.postimg.cc/rmm9g90D/2023-12-24-05-10-11.png)

### **FAQ**

**Can I use this without When Dungeons Arise?**

Yes.

**Can I use this server-side only without installing it on clients?**

Yes.

**Will you port this back to 1.12.2?**

No.

**Do these dungeons generate if I add them on a world I already explored?**

Yes. You will have to explore further and load new chunks though! Remember to save a backup of your world just in case.

**Are you going to add a config file?**

This mod is datapack-based, and therefore datapacks are required to configure it. Public templates will be available soon.
